name: Ollama client
description: Installs the OpenAI-compatible Python client and configures connection env vars for an Ollama service running on the host. Assumes Ollama is running via Docker Desktop — see host-services/ollama/ for setup.

host.description: Hostname where the Ollama service is running. Docker Desktop maps host.docker.internal to the Windows host automatically.

port.description: Port the Ollama service is listening on.

model.description: Default model tag (any tag from https://ollama.com/library, e.g. llama3.2, gemma4:e2b).

apiKey.description: Value for OPENAI_API_KEY. Ollama does not require a real key; override only when pointing at a real OpenAI-compatible API.

contextSize.description: Context window size hint written as OLLAMA_CONTEXT_SIZE for use by client code.
